R0210.title: Industrial Protocol Vulnerability Exploitation
R0210.definition: Attackers exploit security vulnerabilities in industrial IoT protocols like Modbus, OPC-UA, Profinet to achieve unauthorized access and device control.
R0210.description: Attackers exploit security vulnerabilities in industrial IoT protocols like Modbus, OPC-UA, Profinet to achieve unauthorized access and device control.
R0210.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
